market_pulse: Monday activity is light across most venues; strongest signals from OMNIA (Zedd on 4/17 announcement) and LIV (Dom Bresky, Cloonee, Marcos Trous weekend lineup generating social engagement).

content_gaps.description: Competitors are leveraging tech-house and melodic tech trends (Westend, Duke Dumont, Tape Beats) with heavy TikTok promotion; LIV is not matching this audio positioning.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Feature a tech-house or melodic tech artist in next weekend social content with trending audio samples.

content_gaps.description: XS and OMNIA are driving engagement with promoter partnerships (@normanjay_lasvegas, @edsonvegasclubpromoter); LIV is not as visible in promoter-driven content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Partner with top Vegas promoters (@livlvguestlist, @livlevguestlist) to amplify LIV's reach through their established audiences.

content_gaps.description: GLOBETHOTTER (@globeth0tter) is actively reviewing competing nightclubs (LIV, XS) with high engagement; no coordinated content with LIV creators.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Identify and nurture micro-influencers who've reviewed LIV; offer incentives for recurring creator partnerships.

influencer_activity.mention: Honest review of LIV Nightclub as a gal on guest list (591 Likes); also reviewed XS Nightclub (175 Likes).
XS / ENCORE Las Vegas Promoter with 176K followers driving guest list and VIP table reservations across Wynn properties.
OMNIA Nightclub viral content (2.3M Likes) showcasing the main room chandelier and Satisfaction performance experience.

liv_outreach_targets: @globeth0tter - High-engagement travel + nightlife influencer with proven LIV audience
@livlvguestlist (Edwin) - Internal promoter; expand partnership with content collaboration
Melody Nightlife Creators - Tech-house and melodic tech audio-first content creators
